# Cai

> Cai is a free, open-source AI action layer for macOS.

## What is Cai?

Cai is an AI action layer for Mac that lives in your menu bar. Press ⌥C on any text or image and instantly run custom actions: AI prompts, shell scripts, URL shortcuts, summaries, translations, OCR, GitHub issues, Linear tickets. It runs locally by default with a built-in AI model (Ministral 3B), supports Apple Intelligence on macOS 26+, and works with external providers like LM Studio, Ollama, and cloud APIs. Cloud optional.

## Key Features

- Custom-action layer: run AI prompts, shell scripts, URL shortcuts, and MCP-powered integrations (GitHub, Linear) on any selected text or image, in any app
- Built-in AI model (Ministral 3B) that works offline, with no setup needed
- Apple Intelligence support (macOS 26+, M1 or later)
- Create GitHub issues and Linear tickets from any app
- Image to text (OCR) from screenshots and images
- Replace Selection: paste AI results back over your original selection, in place
- Custom prompts, shell commands, and URL actions
- Route results to Slack, Notion, Mail, or any app via custom destinations
- Clipboard history with search and pin
- Works with LM Studio, Ollama, Jan AI, and cloud providers (OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, Mistral, OpenRouter)
- Community extensions (YAML): browse and install actions shared by others, no build step
- Keyboard-first design: type to filter, ⌘1–9 to execute
- Free and open source (MIT license)

## How It Works

1. Select: highlight text or an image in any app
2. Summon: press ⌥C to open the action menu
3. Act: pick an action (summarize, translate, create ticket, run custom prompt, etc.)

## Positioning

- Action-shaped, not chat-shaped. You do not type a prompt to use Cai. You select text, hit ⌥C, and pick an action.
- Selection-triggered, not command-launched. Cai already knows what you selected and shows the right actions automatically.
- Local by default. No account required. Free and MIT-licensed.

## Comparisons

- Cai vs ChatGPT: https://getcai.app/vs/chatgpt/
- Cai vs Raycast: https://getcai.app/vs/raycast/
- Cai vs BoltAI: https://getcai.app/vs/boltai/
- Cai vs Alter: https://getcai.app/vs/alter/
- Cai vs Maccy: https://getcai.app/vs/maccy/
